title: hyoscyamus eminens
intro: Hyoscyamus niger, commonly known as black henbane, is a plant species that belongs to the nightshade family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of black henbane include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as pain relief and reduced inflammation. Black henbane is typically prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
